offer: For law firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate billing records cause delayed payments. We provide extraction and formatting instead of manual entry and formatting in spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate and poorly formatted legal billing records
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm help

Collect 10 short interviews from target users
